states.description: Lease is active, tenant complying with all obligations
Tenant violated loading, parking, or obstruction rules; violation fee assessed
Landlord issued written notice; tenant has 10 days to cure violation
Tenant successfully cured violation within cure period
Tenant failed to cure within 10 days or committed material breach; default remedies available
Lease terminated due to uncured default

effects.description: Monthly base rent payment on first day of month
Violation fee for loading outside permitted 6am-8am window

transitions.description: Tenant loads outside permitted window without approval

effects.description: Violation fee for blocking service lane, common areas, driveways, sidewalks, fire lanes, trash areas, or other tenants' access

transitions.description: Tenant blocks service lane or common areas

effects.description: Violation fee for parking, idling, charging, connecting to power, or operating refrigerated vehicle without consent

transitions.description: Tenant uses refrigerated vehicle without landlord consent

effects.description: Landlord issues written notice; tenant has 10 days to cure violation

transitions.description: Landlord provides written notice of violation triggering cure period
Tenant successfully cures violation within 10-day cure period
Tenant fails to cure violation within 10-day cure period
Tenant returns to full compliance after curing violation

effects.description: Tenant forfeits right to use premises for prohibited warehouse/commissary/distribution depot conversion

transitions.description: Tenant converts premises to warehouse, commissary, or distribution depot triggering default

effects.description: Tenant forfeits all rights to premises and lease is terminated

transitions.description: Landlord exercises default remedies and terminates lease

effects.description: Additional rent charges as they become payable

transitions.description: Tenant pays additional rent charges when due

effects.description: Tenant indemnifies landlord for claims, losses, fines, property damage, personal injury, or increased insurance costs from loading or vehicle activity

transitions.description: Tenant indemnifies landlord for damages arising from loading or vehicle operations

rules.description: Tenant shall not convert the Premises into a warehouse, commissary, or distribution depot.

effects.description: Violation triggers default remedies

rules.description: Tenant must ensure wholesale packing remains incidental to bakery business and does not materially increase noise, odors, waste, traffic, utility use, or loading activity beyond retail bakery level.

constraints.description: Wholesale activity must remain incidental and not materially increase impacts

rules.action: Obtain consent for change in use
rules.description: Any change in use requires Landlord's prior written consent.

triggers.condition: Tenant desires to change use of Premises

rules.description: Tenant shall continue to pay monthly base rent of $6,200.00 on the first day of each calendar month.

triggers.condition: First day of each calendar month

effects.description: Monthly base rent payment

rules.description: Any charge, reimbursement, fee, or other amount payable by Tenant under this Addendum constitutes additional rent under the Lease.

triggers.condition: Any charge becomes payable under this Addendum

effects.description: Additional rent payment

rules.description: Unless Landlord gives prior written approval for a different window, Tenant's loading activity shall occur only between 6:00 a.m. and 8:00 a.m. on business days.

constraints.description: Loading window restricted to 6:00 a.m. to 8:00 a.m. on business days

rules.action: Block service lane or common areas
rules.description: Tenant shall not block the service lane, common areas, driveways, sidewalks, fire lanes, trash areas, or other tenants' access.

effects.description: Violation fee for obstruction

rules.description: Tenant shall comply with all reasonable building rules, municipal requirements, insurance requirements, and safety directions applicable to loading activity.
Tenant shall not park, idle, charge, connect to power, or operate a refrigerated vehicle at the Premises overnight without Landlord's prior written consent.

effects.description: Violation fee for unauthorized refrigerated vehicle

rules.action: Provide required information in consent request
rules.description: A request for refrigerated vehicle consent must identify the vehicle, license plate, refrigeration unit, expected hours of use, parking location, insurance coverage, cargo endorsement, noise rating, and any power requirements.

triggers.condition: Tenant seeks refrigerated vehicle consent

rules.action: Pay violation fee for loading outside window
rules.description: If Tenant loads outside the permitted loading window, Tenant shall pay a violation fee of $350.00 per occurrence.

triggers.condition: Tenant loads outside permitted window without approval

effects.description: Violation fee per occurrence

rules.description: If Tenant obstructs common areas, Tenant shall pay a violation fee of $350.00 per occurrence.

triggers.condition: Tenant blocks service lane, common areas, driveways, sidewalks, fire lanes, trash areas, or other tenants' access

effects.description: Violation fee per occurrence

rules.action: Pay violation fee for unauthorized refrigerated vehicle
rules.description: If Tenant parks or operates a refrigerated vehicle without required consent, Tenant shall pay a violation fee of $350.00 per occurrence.

triggers.condition: Tenant parks, idles, charges, connects to power, or operates refrigerated vehicle without consent

effects.description: Violation fee per occurrence

rules.action: Cure unauthorized loading or parking violation
rules.description: Tenant shall have ten days after written notice to cure an unauthorized loading or parking violation. Cure may require removal of the vehicle, cessation of the unauthorized activity, provision of insurance evidence, or submission of a complete consent request.

triggers.condition: Landlord provides written notice of violation

effects.description: Tenant must cure violation within 10 days

constraints.description: Ten-day cure period after written notice

rules.description: Before using any refrigerated vehicle in connection with the Premises, Tenant shall maintain commercial auto liability coverage and cargo or spoilage coverage reasonably acceptable to Landlord.

triggers.condition: Before using refrigerated vehicle

rules.description: Tenant shall indemnify and hold Landlord harmless from claims, losses, fines, property damage, personal injury, or increased insurance costs arising from Tenant's loading operations or refrigerated vehicle activity, except to the extent caused by Landlord's gross negligence or willful misconduct.

triggers.condition: Claims, losses, fines, property damage, personal injury, or increased insurance costs arise from Tenant's loading or vehicle activity

effects.description: Indemnification payment to Landlord

constraints.description: Indemnity does not apply to extent caused by Landlord's gross negligence or willful misconduct

unmappable_rules.action: Use premises for specified bakery activities
unmappable_rules.description: Tenant may use the Premises for retail bakery sales, preparation of baked goods, customer pickup orders, incidental wholesale packing, and office activities related to the bakery business.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: Landlord may condition consent on reasonable operational safeguards, including proof of insurance, traffic controls, or limits on vehicle idling.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Tenant requests change in use consent

unmappable_rules.action: No invoice required for rent payment
unmappable_rules.description: Tenant's obligation to pay rent and additional rent is not conditioned on receipt of an invoice.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: REPRESENTATION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.action: Use rear service lane for loading
unmappable_rules.description: Tenant may use the rear service lane solely for loading and unloading bakery products, ingredients, packaging, and related supplies.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives

constraints.description: Use limited to bakery products, ingredients, packaging, and related supplies only

unmappable_rules.description: Landlord may give prior written approval for a different loading window than 6:00 a.m. to 8:00 a.m.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Tenant requests different loading window

effects.description: Modified loading window becomes effective

unmappable_rules.description: Landlord may grant or withhold consent for refrigerated vehicle operations.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Tenant submits compliant consent request

unmappable_rules.action: Impose conditions on refrigerated vehicle consent
unmappable_rules.description: Landlord may require Tenant to use a designated parking space, prohibit engine idling, require drip protection, require proof of insurance, or impose other reasonable conditions to protect the property and other occupants.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Landlord grants refrigerated vehicle consent

unmappable_rules.description: Any parking or loading right under this Addendum is appurtenant to Tenant's occupancy of the Premises and has no separate value independent of the Lease.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: REPRESENTATION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: Unauthorized activity violation fee of $350.00 per occurrence applies to loading outside window, obstruction, or unauthorized refrigerated vehicle operations.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: REPRESENTATION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.action: Event of default for failure to cure
unmappable_rules.description: Failure to cure within the ten-day cure period is an event of default under the Lease.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: COVENANT is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Ten days elapse after written notice without cure

effects.description: Violation becomes event of default under Lease

unmappable_rules.description: Upon an uncured default, Landlord may suspend loading access.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Uncured default occurs

effects.description: Loading access suspended

unmappable_rules.action: Revoke refrigerated vehicle consent upon default
unmappable_rules.description: Upon an uncured default, Landlord may revoke refrigerated vehicle consent.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Uncured default occurs

effects.description: Refrigerated vehicle consent revoked

unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Uncured default occurs

effects.description: Unauthorized vehicles removed

unmappable_rules.description: Upon an uncured default, Landlord may seek injunctive relief.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Uncured default occurs

unmappable_rules.action: Exercise remedies under Lease upon default
unmappable_rules.description: Upon an uncured default, Landlord may exercise any remedy available under the Lease.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Uncured default occurs

unmappable_rules.action: No waiver of rights by acceptance of rent or delay
unmappable_rules.description: Acceptance of rent or delay in enforcement does not waive Landlord's rights.

unmappable_rules.action: Lease remains in effect except as modified
unmappable_rules.description: Except as expressly modified by this Addendum, the Lease remains in full force and effect.

unmappable_rules.description: Landlord makes no representation regarding Tenant's tax treatment of equipment, vehicles, delivery routes, or business expenses.
